design_plan: Python RNG Execution: seed=hash(title+kind+audience+generated_at) → architecture=workflow-command-center, components=[workflow-playbook-timeline, source-card-dossier, implementation-checklist], GSAP=[pinned-chapter-scroll, hover-physics]. AIDA Check: hero=Attention, proof chapters=Interest, workflow media=Desire, CTA band=Action. Font Selection: Cabinet Grotesk primary. Hero Math Verification: H1 max-width 1120px, clamp(44px–72px), 2–3 lines. Bento Density Verification: grid-auto-flow:dense present. GSAP Motion Selection: guarded ScrollTrigger + hover physics. Label Sweep & Button Check: all CTAs black/white pills, correct href.
headline: Super for busy executives who want a real personal assistant

site_brief.audience: busy executives who want a real personal assistant
site_brief.goal: Create a conversion-focused landing page for this audience. Tie current market evidence to pain points, then show how Super can operate apps and reuse a computer-use cache for repeated work. Include a long-form field guide for this niche with concrete workflows, how-to steps, role-specific examples, objections, and a setup checklist.
queries: busy executives who want a real personal assistant AI assistant
busy executives who want a real personal assistant personal AI agent
site_brief.title: Super for busy executives who want a real personal assistant

summary: A premium niche landing page for busy executives who need a personal AI assistant that actually operates computers, executes workflows end‑to‑end, and gets cheaper over time through a reusable computer-use cache.
